title: Make binding util internal
body:
The functions are supposed to be called only from generated code

Signed-off-by: Matej Vasek <mvasek@redhat.com>

comments.body: Note that making those functions private is potentially braking for some users. Still the package is out one or two weeks so I doubt anybody is using them. We did more severe change between `3.0.0` and `3.0.1` https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/9414.

> Note that making those functions private is potentially braking for some users. Still the package is out one or two weeks so I doubt anybody is using them. We did more severe change between `3.0.0` and `3.0.1` #9414.

Currently, Podman 3.0.X is still shipping a `go module v2`.  So we need to update the go module to v3 which would allow for getting this change in without really breaking users.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *matejvasek*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
